calendar.matters:
Notice Of Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Sep-07-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Kevin J. Woods, Esq. of White and Woods LLP, 415.231.5711, appearing by CourtCall for the Petitioner Wells Fargo Clearing Services.
No appearance by any other party or counsel.

PETITIONER WELLS FARGO CLEARING SERVICES, LLC'S PETITION TO CONFIRM CONTRACTUAL ARBITRATION AWARD.

Matter called. Counsel for Petitioner Wells Fargo Clearing Services states that the Respondent filed a petitiion for bankruptcy in Arizona and that it is his understanding that the bankruptcy would stay this action. Based upon the representations from Counsel for Petitioner Wells Fargo Clearing Services, the matter was taken Off Calendar.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600, 415.551.5868, Email: torreanom@aol.com. =(302/RBU)
